name: Tmall Global platform qualification pack
change_note: Migrated from script PLATFORM_HINTS into a composable platform pack.
checklist_hints: Check overseas entity, brand authorization, import/customs model, Chinese label, and category-specific approvals.

requirements.requirement: Verify current Tmall Global overseas entity, merchant route, brand authorization chain, and category admission requirements.
requirements.decision_effect: Unsupported entity route or brand authorization prevents approval.
requirements.notes: Check official platform source for the exact category and merchant type.

requirements.requirement: Verify product import/cross-border route, Chinese label, claims, and category-specific platform materials.
requirements.decision_effect: Unclear import route, missing Chinese label, or unsupported category materials require more information or escalation.
requirements.notes: Pair with country-CN-import for China-specific regulator/customs checks.

sources.title: 天猫国际招商入驻
sources.confirms: 天猫国际招商入驻入口用于核验海外主体、店铺类型、招商类目和入驻资质路径。

sources.title: 天猫国际规则
sources.confirms: 天猫国际规则中心用于核验商家、商品、品牌、类目、交易、违规和平台治理规则。

sources.title: 天猫国际品牌及资质规则入口
sources.confirms: 天猫国际品牌、授权链路和资质材料应以规则中心及招商入驻要求为准。

sources.title: 天猫国际类目资质规则入口
sources.confirms: 天猫国际类目资质、商品准入、标签和材料要求应按规则中心对应类目核验。

sources.title: 天猫国际跨境进口服务入口
sources.confirms: 天猫国际跨境进口业务需要区分跨境零售、保税、直邮和平台商品准入路径。

gaps: Seed pack: verify current official Tmall Global policy pages per case before final decisions.
